message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' define the entities
entity ShoppingCart {
  * SubTotal : Currency
  * TaxAmount : Currency
  * DiscountAmount : Currency
  * TotalAmount : Currency
}

entity ProductOnCart {
  * Price : Currency
  Quantity : Integer
  * Total : Currency
}

' define the classes
class Customer
class Product

' define the relationships
ShoppingCart "1..1" -- "0..*" ProductOnCart : ProductsOnCart
ProductOnCart "0..*" -- "1..1" Product
ShoppingCart "0..*" -- "1..1" Customer

@enduml
```
